@comment_name: Canonical business name — align with GBP and all directories (NAP consistency). Both trade names are in active use; 'Four Winds Roots Pharmacy' matches Lumino Health and Ontario Health atHome. 'R.O.O.T.S. Four Winds Pharmacy' is used by PharmacyList, FedEx, and Cortico. Owner to confirm preferred primary for website.
name: Four Winds Roots Pharmacy
@comment_legalName: Operating entity per Medimap directory listing ('Can Pharm Services Inc.'). User-supplied variant is 'Can Pharm Service Inc'. Ontario Business Registry not yet verified — confirm exact spelling with owner.
description: A holistic community pharmacy at Keele and Finch in North York, specialising in herbs, supplements, and drug interactions alongside full prescription dispensing, blister packaging, free delivery, and MedsCheck services.
disambiguatingDescription: Independent holistic pharmacy at 3932A Keele St (Centennial Plaza), North York — formerly listed as Guardian Four Winds Pharmacy under a previous franchise arrangement. Currently operating as Four Winds Roots Pharmacy / R.O.O.T.S. Four Winds Pharmacy, with holistic wellness, optical, and full dispensary services.
@comment_url: TEMPORARY: pointed at the live Netlify URL so search engines can index the site now. REVERT to https://fourwindsrootspharmacy.ca once that domain is registered.
@comment_images: logo and image fields REMOVED — the referenced /images/logo.png and /images/storefront.jpg do not exist yet and would 404, breaking Google Rich Results. Re-add (pointing at real files on the final domain) once the logo and storefront photo are available.

employee.@comment: Confirmed: Ontario Health atHome directory (torontocentralhealthline.ca, last updated 2026-03-10). OCP registration number not yet retrieved — TODO confirm with owner or live OCP register lookup.

employee.name: Pamela Clarke
employee.@comment: Confirmed: Ontario Health atHome directory. 'Natural Health Practitioner' is NOT a regulated title under Ontario's RHPA — describe exactly as listed. Author of Take Control Now (FriesenPress, 2015, ISBN 978-1460258354). Do NOT describe as RN or list private credentials in marketing copy.

availableService.name: Prescription Dispensing
availableService.description: Full-service prescription dispensing at $12.99 dispensing fee.

availableService.name: Prescription Refills
availableService.description: Fast, easy prescription refills with free delivery available across North York.

availableService.name: Prescription Transfers
availableService.description: Transfer your prescriptions from any pharmacy — we handle the paperwork.

availableService.name: MedsCheck Medication Reviews
availableService.description: Free government-funded MedsCheck medication reviews under the Ontario Drug Benefit program, conducted by a licensed pharmacist.

availableService.name: Blister Packaging
availableService.description: Customized blister packs for seniors and patients managing complex medication regimens, provided at no additional cost with your prescriptions.
availableService.@comment: Confirmed no-extra-cost: Ontario Health atHome directory.

availableService.name: Free Prescription Delivery
availableService.description: Free local delivery of prescription medications across North York.
availableService.@comment: Confirmed: Ontario Health atHome directory — 'free local delivery of prescription medication'.

availableService.name: Minor Ailments Assessment and Treatment
availableService.description: Ontario pharmacist expanded-scope assessment and prescribing for minor ailments confirmed at this location: skin rashes, pink eye (conjunctivitis), insect bites, acne, and uncomplicated urinary tract infections.
availableService.@comment: Confirmed conditions: Ontario Health atHome directory. Ontario has 13 authorized conditions province-wide; only these 5 are confirmed for this pharmacy.

availableService.name: ODB Smoking Cessation Program
availableService.description: Pharmacist support for smoking cessation under the Ontario Drug Benefit Smoking Cessation Program.

availableService.name: Holistic Wellness Consultation
availableService.description: Holistic pharmacy practice including herb-drug interaction review, supplement guidance, and whole-person care.
availableService.@comment: Confirmed descriptor: 'registered holistic pharmacy that deals with herbs and drug interactions' — Ontario Health atHome directory. 'Registered' refers to OCP community pharmacy registration, not a separate holistic credential.

availableService.name: Sharps Disposal Program
availableService.description: Safe sharps (needle) disposal for patients managing injectable medications at home.

availableService.name: Medications Return Program
availableService.description: Safe return and disposal of unused or expired medications.

availableService.name: FedEx Authorized ShipCentre
availableService.description: Co-located FedEx Authorized ShipCentre offering shipping-label purchase, FedEx Express and Ground drop-off, Hold-at-Location, and QR-code returns.
availableService.@comment: Confirmed: FedEx locator (local.fedex.com/en-ca/on/north-york/yrlfl). Co-located at same address, uses same phone number 416-398-8200.

availableService.description: Optical and wellness services under one roof at Keele and Finch.
